# Rule Name Status Action Source Destination Services
1 Allow-Internet ✓ On Accept LAN WAN HTTPS
Transaction IDN/A
Policy TypeNetwork
IP FamilyIPv4
ActionAccept
Log TrafficEnable
ScheduleAll The Time
Source ZonesLAN
Source NetworksAny
Destination ZonesWAN
Destination NetworksAny
Services/PortsHTTPS
Web FilterDefault Policy
Application ControlAllowAll
Intrusion PreventionGeneralPolicy
Virus ScanningDisable
Zero Day ProtectionDisable
Proxy ModeDisable
HTTPS DecryptionDisable
2 Guest-Web ✗ Off Accept DMZ WAN HTTP
Transaction IDN/A
Policy TypeNetwork
ActionAccept
Log TrafficDisable
ScheduleAll The Time
Source ZonesDMZ
Source NetworksGuestNet
Destination ZonesWAN
Destination NetworksAny
Services/PortsHTTP
Web FilterNone
Application ControlNone
Intrusion PreventionNone
Virus ScanningDisable
3 Internal-DNS ✓ On Accept LAN LAN DNS
ActionAccept
Log TrafficEnable
Source ZonesLAN
Source NetworksAny
Destination ZonesLAN
Destination NetworksDNS-Server
Services/PortsDNS
Web FilterNone
Application ControlNone
Intrusion PreventionNone
4 Open-WAN ✓ On Accept LAN WAN Any
ActionAccept
Log TrafficEnable
Source ZonesLAN
Source NetworksAny
Destination ZonesWAN
Destination NetworksAny
Services/PortsAny
Web FilterNone
Application ControlNone
Intrusion PreventionNone
5 VPN-Access ✓ On Accept VPN LAN Any
ActionAccept
Log TrafficEnable
Source ZonesVPN
Source NetworksVPNPool
Destination ZonesLAN
Destination NetworksServerNet
Services/PortsAny
Web FilterNone
Application ControlNone
Intrusion PreventionNone
6 Duplicate-WAN ✓ On Accept LAN WAN Any
ActionAccept
Log TrafficEnable
Source ZonesLAN
Source NetworksAny
Destination ZonesWAN
Destination NetworksAny
Services/PortsAny
Web FilterNone
Application ControlNone
Intrusion PreventionNone
